global.title: Trump speaks with reporters after canceling Witkoff, Kushner's trip to Pakistan for talks with Iran - CBS News
global.summary: A planned trip by U.S. envoys for talks with Iran was canceled, signaling a fresh complication in already fragile diplomacy.
global.whyItMatters: This is a meaningful new development in a major conflict story that affects prayer, preaching, and pastoral awareness around fear, peace, and global instability.

global.title: IEA Chief Warns Of 'Biggest Energy Security Threat In History' As Hormuz Crisis Deepens: 'Getting Worse Every Day' - Yahoo Finance
global.summary: The head of the IEA warns the Hormuz crisis is worsening daily, raising concerns about energy supply, prices, and wider economic strain.
global.whyItMatters: Energy shocks often become household stress, which pastors will feel through congregational anxiety, financial pressure, and community need.

global.title: D.C. officials announce charges against correspondents' dinner shooting suspect - CBS News
global.summary: Authorities announced charges after the shooting tied to the White House Correspondents' Dinner, adding clarity after a shocking act of public violence.
global.whyItMatters: Public violence continues to shape how people process safety, fear, and civic trust—important themes for pastoral care and public prayer.

persecutedChurch.title: Israeli soldier's desecration of crucifix in south Lebanon draws condemnation - Reuters
persecutedChurch.summary: A soldier's desecration of a crucifix in a Christian village in south Lebanon drew condemnation from Israeli leaders, U.S. officials, and church leaders, with an investigation underway.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: This concerns the dignity and protection of Christian communities and sacred symbols, and invites informed prayer for justice, repentance, and peace.

persecutedChurch.title: Israel appoints special envoy to Christian world amid growing backlash - Haaretz
persecutedChurch.summary: Following several incidents that angered Christians globally, Israel appointed a special envoy to the Christian world as a diplomatic response.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: This is a fresh development that may shape Christian-Jewish relations and offers a new angle for pastoral reflection on witness, reconciliation, and advocacy.

leadership.title: Why The Leadership Traits That Win Promotions Fail Employees - Forbes
leadership.summary: This piece argues that the traits rewarded in rising leaders are often different from the traits employees most need, especially trustworthiness, steadiness, and self-awareness.
leadership.whyItMatters: Helpful for pastoral leadership: churches need leaders who build trust, not just visibility or momentum.

goodNews.title: Watch: How one orangutan braved new bridge to unite his split community - BBC
goodNews.summary: New footage shows an orangutan using a long-awaited bridge, a hopeful conservation moment that could reconnect a divided primate community.
goodNews.whyItMatters: A small but vivid picture of restoration and reconnection—useful as a hopeful image in a weary news cycle.
